description: Resolve the memory starvation and CrashLoopBackOff state for the 'batch-analyzer' workload in the 'data-processing' namespace. Ensure the workload has a memory limit of at least 400Mi and the 'processing-quota' ResourceQuota has a total memory limit of at least 1.5Gi. Do not modify the 'stream-router' service. Access the 'local' cluster via Rancher at https://localhost using credentials admin / Admin12345678!.

metadata.occupation: Computer Systems Engineers/Architects / Site Reliability Engineer
